### AI Tool Usage Not Described

You indicated that AI tools were used in preparing this PR, but you have not provided a description of which tools you used or how you used them. At least 5 words of description are required.

**What to do:**

Add a brief description below the checked AI disclosure checkbox in your PR description. For example:

```
- [x] **If AI tools were used**, I have disclosed which ones, and fully reviewed and verified their output.

Used GitHub Copilot for initial code generation. All output was manually reviewed, tested, and verified for correctness.
```

Your description should cover:

- Which AI tool(s) you used (e.g. GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, Claude)
- How you used them (e.g. code generation, writing tests, drafting commit messages)

Please note that you are fully responsible for the correctness and quality of all content in this PR, regardless of how it was generated.
